title: Assistant Nurse Clinician (Community / Long term care) #HJO
description:
Job Description:

  • Patient Care & Monitoring: Provide personalized care, assess recovery, and escalate concerns as needed.
  • Admissions & Discharges: Manage patient admissions, transfers, and discharge planning.
  • Team Collaboration: Work with colleagues to implement evidence-based treatments for optimal outcomes.
  • Medical Rounds & Procedures: Participate in rounds, execute physician orders, and assist in procedures.
  • Communication & Problem-Solving: Update the team on patient progress and support clinical challenges.
  • Patient Education & Resource Management: Educate patients and manage resources efficiently.
  • Infection Control & Safety: Monitor infection prevention practices and emergency response efforts.
  • Training & Development: Train and supervise new nurses and students while supporting department initiatives.

Job Requirement:

  • Min Degree in Nursing
  • Min 3 yrs of relevant perm inpatient & senior nursing experience
  • Preferred in Advanced / Specialist Diploma in Geriatric / Community Nursing



Interested candidates are invited to email your resume to:


jen.ooi@recruitexpress.com.sg


Jenalyn Ooi Huai Sian (R1765551)

Recruit Express Pte Ltd | Company Reg. No. 199601303W | EA License Number: 99C4599


We regret only suitable candidates will be shortlisted for an interview.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
